title: codereview-pass3 chunk1: rate limit array change may need K_MUTEX_DEFINE per jzne bead; P3 style
close_reason: Added dedicated s_rate_mutex per jzne pattern for rate limit arrays in coap_dtn.c to address P3 style issue. Separated rate limiting locks from dtn_mutex for independent resources. Verified no dead code, correct locking in deaddrop_post/confessions_post. Commit 57cb3ec88. Push blocked by unrelated rebase conflict on gateway board conf (resolved locally but aborted to avoid 300+ commit rebase).
